required_evidence: confirmed ai_infra autonomous expansion preflight
policy_file and expanded limits recorded in run.json
gap proof with duplicate checks before each task
validated ai_infra coverage-map evidence for all required layers
domain loop-state.json with coverage evidence
raw evidence or existing raw reuse evidence
curated wiki source_refs
wiki validate --domain ai_infra result
search/API visibility evidence for new knowledge
frontend visibility evidence when services are running
crawler workbench API freshness evidence for sources, channels, queue, wiki, and search
Domain Channels evidence for new or changed crawler source subscriptions
Loop Dashboard freshness evidence for current run, child tasks, agent actions, evaluator scenarios, and completed history
service availability evidence for crawler backend, crawler frontend, and loop dashboard during each round
link probe or blocked/auth evidence for new external sources
secret scan evidence for changed paths
code test evidence when crawler/harness/frontend/backend changes
autonomous-scope-result.json
supply-chain-result.json for dependency changes
commit-result.json
fresh no-action evidence before stopped_no_action
